prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学为985、211、双 一流高校，软科主榜2021–2026年稳定排名第21–22名，全国顶尖水平；2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要源于学伴事件遗留影响；抖音热度总排名第20（高热），短 视频曝光量高，报考关注度较高；历史投档异常方面，2022年陕西断档、2024年四川调档线下降63分等信号曾出现，但近年影响逐步减弱；数学A+、临床医学A- 、控制科学与工程A、中国语言文学A、外国语言文学A、马克思主义理论A等19个学科获A-及以上评级，数学、临床医学等王牌学科对物理类考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年广东省物理类考生456000人，较2025年440208人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧；山东大学位于山东省，非广东省 本地高校，跨省报考存在一定地域偏好；该校在广东省物理类招生人数约129–145人，占比较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后移趋势、2026年计划缩招（-10人，-7%） 与广东省物理类考生小幅增加（+3.6%）的双重竞争压力，以及学校声誉偏负面但抖音高热关注并存，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准18205名基础上明显前移（竞争加剧 ，位次数字减小）；预测最低位次约17391名，区间16891–17891名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 15382 → 14015 → 15515 → 16275 → 18205, showing a continuous decline in recent years, with a cumulative decline of about 2690 positions over the past 3 years. The 2025 baseline is about 18205. Enrollment numbers: 2021: 129 → 2022: 133 → 2023: 142 → 2024: 145 → 2025: 143 → 2026: 133. In 2026, enrollment decreases by 10 compared to 2025, a reduction of about 7%, intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. It ranks steadily at 21st–22nd nationally on the Soft Science Main Ranking from 2021 to 2026, indicating top-tier national level. In 2026, its reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, mainly due to the lingering impact of the 'study partner' incident. On Douyin (TikTok), its overall popularity ranks 20th (high heat), with high short video exposure and considerable application attention. Historical admission anomalies include a break in Shaanxi in 2022 and a 63-point drop in the admission line in Sichuan in 2024, but these effects have gradually weakened. It has 19 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Mathematics, A- in Clinical Medicine, A in Control Science and Engineering, A in Chinese Language and Literature, A in Foreign Languages and Literature, and A in Marxist Theory. Flagship disciplines like Mathematics and Clinical Medicine are highly attractive to Physics Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,208 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition. Shandong University is located in Shandong Province, not a local university in Guangdong, so cross-province application involves some regional preference. Its enrollment for Physics Category in Guangdong is about 129–145 students, a relatively small proportion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline in historical rankings, the dual competitive pressure from the 2026 enrollment reduction (-10, -7%) and the slight increase in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong (+3.6%), along with the university's somewhat negative reputation but high Douyin heat, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will significantly move forward (increased competition, smaller ranking number) from the 2025 baseline of 18205. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 17391, with a range of 16891–17891.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking is about 17391, with a range of 16891–17891. Candidates with rankings near the lower bound of the range (around 16900 or below) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors like Clinical Medicine, Computer Science, and Mathematics. Those in the middle of the range (around 17200–17600) should target Tier 2 new engineering majors such as Automation, Electronic Information, and Cyberspace Security. Candidates near the upper bound (around 17800 or above) are advised to secure Tier 3 majors as a safety net. With a 7% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, it is recommended to adopt a somewhat conservative approach when applying.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. On Douyin (TikTok), it ranks 20th in overall popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure, so application attention is not low.
